product_overview: A comprehensive calendar and event management system for service providers to manage their availability, appointments, and provider information through an authenticated dashboard interface.
core_goals: Enable providers to view and manage their schedule using a calendar interface.
Provide full CRUD capabilities for managing availability slots and appointments with proper validation and user feedback.
Ensure secure authentication and authorization for provider-specific routes and actions.
Display aggregated provider statistics and quick access to key functionalities in a centralized dashboard.
key_features: Provider Dashboard showing provider details, statistics, and navigation shortcuts.
Calendar management with week view, time restrictions (8 AM to 8 PM), and color-coded events indicating availability status.
Event CRUD operations supporting creation, editing, deletion (with confirmation), and detail views for booked slots.
Authentication handling to restrict access to provider routes using Better Auth and route-level protections.
Modal forms with validation for event creation and updates, including duration options (15, 30, 45, 60 minutes).
Filtering to display only future events within a 30-day past window.
Reusable UI components like Cards, Buttons, Inputs, Selects, and Alert Dialogs to ensure consistent UX/UI across the application.
user_flow_summary: Provider logs in and is authenticated via Better Auth.
Upon successful login, the provider is taken to the Provider Dashboard displaying their information and statistics.
From the dashboard, the provider navigates to the calendar view to see and manage their availability slots.
Provider creates new availability slots by selecting time in the calendar and filling in event details using a modal form.
Provider edits existing unbooked availability slots or deletes them after confirmation.
Booked appointment details are view-only and shown distinctly in the calendar.
The application validates all inputs and prevents illegal actions such as creating slots in the past or overlapping booked events.
If the user is not authorized or lacks provider records, they are redirected to the login page to ensure secure data access.
validation_criteria: Provider dashboard displays accurate provider info and updated statistics.
Calendar only shows events within allowable times (8 AM - 8 PM) and correct color coding for availability status.
Event creation and editing validate inputs including non-past dates and allowed durations.
Booked events cannot be edited or deleted; only unbooked events can be modified or removed with user confirmation.
Route protection enforces that only authenticated PROVIDER users with existing provider records can access provider pages.
API interactions for fetching and updating events and provider info return expected results with proper error handling.
UI components render correctly and support responsive interaction patterns.
Provider flows complete successfully without unexpected errors or data inconsistencies.

features.name: Provider Dashboard
features.description: Main provider dashboard displaying provider information, statistics (total future events, booked appointments, available slots), provider details (name, email, department, organization), and quick actions to navigate to calendar.

features.name: Provider Calendar Management
features.description: Calendar interface for providers to manage their availability slots. Allows creating, editing, and deleting events (availability slots). Uses React Big Calendar component with week view, time restrictions (8 AM - 8 PM), color coding (green for available, red for booked), and modal forms for event management. Includes validation for past dates and form inputs.

features.name: Authentication and Route Protection
features.description: Route-level authentication using Better Auth. Protects provider routes from unauthorized access, redirects non-PROVIDER users to login, and verifies provider record existence. PROVIDER users without provider records are redirected to login.

features.name: Event Management
features.description: CRUD operations for provider events (availability slots). Supports creating events with title, description, and duration (15, 30, 45, 60 minutes), updating unbooked events, deleting unbooked events with confirmation, and viewing booked event details (read-only). Events are filtered to show only future dates within the last 30 days.

features.name: API Client
features.description: API fetching utilities for provider routes including provider information, events listing, and event CRUD operations.

features.name: UI Components
features.description: Reusable UI components including Cards, Buttons, Inputs, Labels, Select dropdowns, Alert Dialogs, and Calendar components used across provider routes.
